ideas.name: Confidence-proportional sizing cap
ideas.description: Cap leverage based on confidence: max 3x below 75% confidence, max 5x at 75-85%, full leverage only above 85%.
ideas.expected_edge: Reduce outsized losses from high-leverage, low-edge trades
ideas.source_pattern: Size bias detected: larger positions (>1.5x) have 40% WR vs 60% for smaller positions. Avg PnL: $-0.52 vs $-0.31
ideas.invalidation_reason: 10x leverage tier (>85% confidence) invalidated by execution_forensics: 6-10x leverage = -$0.38/trade net negative on 91 trades despite 41% WR, due to tail-loss domination. High WR at high leverage is misleading without PnL cross-validation. Only the 3x (<75% conf) and 5x (75-85% conf) tiers are supported by forensics evidence.
ideas.note: Lower tiers (3x and 5x) remain valid. Do NOT apply 10x at >85% tier. See HIGH_LEV_10X_FORENSICS_BLOCK in graduated_rules.json.

ideas.name: Time-weighted confidence: boost morning
ideas.description: Apply a confidence multiplier of 1.08 for trades during morning (6:00-12:00 UTC) based on observed time-of-day edge.
ideas.trigger_condition: When current UTC hour is between 6 and 12
ideas.source_pattern: Time-of-day edge: 'morning' (6:00-12:00 UTC) wins 67% vs 'evening' at 50% (spread: 17%)
ideas.note: Redundant with graduated rule TOD_morning_edge. Marking covered to prevent double-application on restart.

ideas.name: Time-weighted confidence: boost evening
ideas.description: Apply a confidence multiplier of 1.08 for trades during evening (18:00-24:00 UTC) based on observed time-of-day edge.
ideas.trigger_condition: When current UTC hour is between 18 and 24
ideas.source_pattern: Significant time-of-day weakness: 'evening' (18:00-24:00 UTC) has only 33% WR over 9 trades
ideas.invalidation_reason: INVERTED: evening=33% WR but applies 1.08x boost (should be penalize). Auto-fix engine validation.

ideas.name: Strategy weight rebalancing
ideas.description: Reduce weight of the dominant strategy by 15% and redistribute to underrepresented strategies.
ideas.expected_edge: Better diversification, reduced fragility to single-strategy failure
ideas.source_pattern: Strategy concentration: 'ensemble' accounts for 91% of all trades (31/34). WR: 61%

ideas.name: Time-weighted confidence: boost night
ideas.description: Apply a confidence multiplier of 1.08 for trades during night (0:00-6:00 UTC) based on observed time-of-day edge.
ideas.trigger_condition: When current UTC hour is between 0 and 6
ideas.source_pattern: Time-of-day edge: 'morning' (6:00-12:00 UTC) wins 67% vs 'night' at 33% (spread: 33%)
ideas.invalidation_reason: INVERTED: night=33% WR but applies 1.08x boost (should be penalize). Auto-fix engine validation.

ideas.name: Time-weighted confidence: boost night
ideas.description: Apply a confidence multiplier of 1.08 for trades during night (0:00-6:00 UTC) based on observed time-of-day edge.
ideas.trigger_condition: When current UTC hour is between 0 and 6
ideas.source_pattern: Significant time-of-day weakness: 'night' (0:00-6:00 UTC) has only 33% WR over 9 trades
ideas.invalidation_reason: INVERTED_DUPLICATE: night=33% WR + boost applied, duplicate of 07f475b8. Deduplication required.

ideas.name: Time-weighted confidence: boost afternoon
ideas.description: Apply a confidence multiplier of 1.08 for trades during afternoon (12:00-18:00 UTC) based on observed time-of-day edge.
ideas.trigger_condition: When current UTC hour is between 12 and 18
ideas.source_pattern: Significant time-of-day weakness: 'afternoon' (12:00-18:00 UTC) has only 33% WR over 15 trades
ideas.invalidation_reason: INVERTED: afternoon=33% WR but applies 1.08x boost (should be penalize). Auto-fix engine validation.

ideas.name: Side balance enforcement
ideas.description: Add a side-balance penalty: if >65% of recent trades are one side, apply a -5% confidence adjustment to additional same-side trades.
ideas.expected_edge: Reduce directional bias that leads to concentrated losses
ideas.source_pattern: Side bias: 80% of trades are LONG but LONG WR is 38% vs 60% for the other side
